name: GitHub Actions Local Runner
description: Installs nektos/act for running GitHub Actions workflows locally inside devcontainers

version.description: Version of act to install, or 'latest' for the most recent release

runnerImage.description: Default runner image size: micro (~200MB), medium (~500MB), or large (~18GB)

configureDocker.description: Configure Docker-outside-of-Docker access for act to spawn runner containers
